fixes.title: Inclusive range for right-child split
fixes.context: Split logic must drop all elements assigned to the left side from `children_right`. Exclusive range left one element behind.

fixes.title: Use stable leaf source when routing split sides
fixes.context: During split creation, node lookup must use the persisted leaf reader. Looking in temporary children caused missing lookups and panic.

fixes.title: Guard empty roots before node-per-tree division
fixes.buggy_code: // no early return before dividing by roots.len()
fixes.context: Deletion-path tree sizing divided by `roots.len()`; when roots was empty this triggered division by zero.

fixes.title: Seek to EOF before switching tmp file to writer mode
fixes.context: After reading tmp-node bytes, reopening the same file for write must append, not overwrite from current reader position.

fixes.title: Empty-index early return in reader search
fixes.context: Search logic assumed at least one item and could panic on empty indexes.

fixes.title: Handle missing tmp-node entries under low-memory path
fixes.context: `None` can be valid in this flow and should merge updates; unwrapping forced panic and replaced previous updates.

fixes.title: Match migration metadata branch on node item field
fixes.context: Upgrade dispatch for metadata records keyed on the wrong field, misclassifying records in multi-index scenarios.

fixes.title: Use correct target threshold for tree generation loop
fixes.context: Stopping criterion for generated tree nodes was biased for small cardinalities, producing wrong target tree counts.

fixes.title: Remove sampled item by id, not by rank
fixes.context: Sampling selected an item id, but removal used rank semantics, so the wrong element was removed from the remaining pool.

fixes.title: Always rewrite split nodes during v0.6 upgrade transformation
fixes.context: Rewrite gate skipped necessary writes after item->tree normalization, leaving stale links in upgraded trees.
